MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

NO OTHER APPEARANCE.

THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. Plaintiff Choo Koon Ng's Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents And Motion For Order That Requests For Admission Be Deemed Admitted is granted. No opposition filed. Sanctions $500. Order signed in opend court. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Aug-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
YUNG MING CHOU, ESQ. for plaintiff and moving party: CHOO KOON NG
NO OTHER APPEARANCE.

THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. CROSS DEFENDANT ROSEMARY HUANG's Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents And Motion For Order That Requests For Admission Be Deemed Admitted is granted. No opposition was filed. Request for sanctions of $500 granted. Order signed in open court. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. NOT REPORTED.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
YUNG MING CHOU, ESQ. for plaintiff and moving party: Choo Ng.

NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. Plaintiff CHOO NG's Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants' and Cross-Cross-Complainants' failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendants and Cross-Cross-Complainants are ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendants and Cross-Cross-Complainants in the amount of $500, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Response To Special Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection & Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
YUNG MING CHOU, ESQ. for plaintiff and moving party: Choo Ng.

NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. Cross-Defendant Rosemary Huang's Motion To Compel Response To Special Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants' and Cross-Cross-Complainants' failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendants and Cross-Cross-Complainants are ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendants and Cross-Cross-Complainants in the amount of $500, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
